name: Xinjiang Zhongtai Chemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Xinjiang Zhongtai Chemical Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells chemicals under the Feng brand name in China. It offers polyvinyl chloride resins for processing and production of polyvinyl chloride boardy products, soft products, paints, and adhesive agents; and ion exchange membrane caustic soda for use in various industries, such as artificial fiber, textile, dyestuff, chemicals for daily use, petroleum and petrochemical, organic synthesis, pharmacy, chemical fertilizer, paper making, plastic, and water treatment industries. The company also provides chlor-alkali, crude salt, calcium carbide, and coke products. It also exports its products in Central Asia, Russia, South Asia, South America, and Africa. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in √É¬úr√É¬ºmqi, China.
